tool.name: payload_encoder
tool.description: Multi-layer encoding with WAF bypass transformations.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Encode payloads using URL, HTML, Base64, Hex, Unicode, Octal - Decode encoded payloads - Apply multiple encodings in sequence - Generate WAF bypass variants of payloads

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The encoding action to perform: - encode: Apply single encoding - decode: Decode a payload - multi_encode: Apply multiple encodings in sequence - generate_bypass: Generate WAF bypass variants

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: Encoding type: url, html, base64, hex, unicode, octal. Required for encode/decode.

parameter.name: encodings
parameter.description: List of encodings for multi_encode (applied in order). Required for multi_encode.

parameter.name: decode
parameter.description: Whether to decode instead of encode (for single encoding)

tool.examples:
# URL encode a payload
encode <script>alert(1)</script> url
# Decode a URL-encoded payload
decode %3Cscript%3E url
# Multi-layer encoding
multi_encode alert(1) ["url", "base64"]
# Generate WAF bypass variants
generate_bypass <script>alert(1)</script>
